question: You must be 18 years old to vote in India.
A person can vote five times in the same day.
Voting is done in secret so no one knows your choice.
You need an ID card to vote at the booth.
Only people with a lot of money can vote.
Ink is put on your finger after you vote.
You can vote using a computer at your home.
Election day is a holiday for workers.
Every political party has its own symbol.
